title: CIE Workflow Instance
description: Schema for a workflow execution instance. Conforms to spec/workflow.yaml state machine definition and orchestrator.yaml state_machine contract.

workflow_instance_id.description: Unique identifier for this workflow execution instance.

execution_id.description: Bound execution context. All agents share this ID within a single run.

workflow_definition_id.description: Reference to the workflow definition. e.g. 'clinical_analysis'.

workflow_version.description: Semantic version of the workflow definition in use.

current_state.description: Current state machine state. Conforms to spec/workflow.yaml states and orchestrator.yaml valid_states.

entrypoint_node_id.description: ID of the first DAG node to execute. Defaults to 'intake'.

active_node_id.description: Currently executing node ID. Null when not running.

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts consumed. Max 3 per spec/workflow.yaml failure_policy.

human_approval_pending.description: True when workflow is suspended at a human_approval node.

nodes.description: Execution records for each DAG node in this workflow instance.

artifact_manifest.description: All artifacts produced during this workflow execution.

audit_log_reference.description: Reference key to the immutable audit log entries for this workflow instance.

evaluation_report_reference.description: Reference to the evaluation report produced at the evaluation node.

node_id.description: Node identifier matching workflow definition. e.g. 'validate_dataset'.

node_type.description: Node type as defined in spec/workflow.yaml.

agent_id.description: Agent responsible for this node. Matches agents/ agent_id values.

depends_on.description: Node IDs that must complete before this node executes.

capability_token_id.description: ID of the ephemeral capability token issued for this node.

decision_branch_taken.description: For decision nodes: which branch was selected and why.

schema_ref.description: Reference to the validating schema. e.g. 'cie://schemas/report.schema.json'.

file_path.description: Relative path within OUTPUT_DIR. Null for in-memory artifacts.
